channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: 🔥 TRON keeps a steady pulse at $0.31 with RSI near 67 and price flirting with Bollinger Band resistance. The setup hints at a potential move toward $0.33 by April 2026, anchored by solid support around $0.30. In the short term, a $0.32 target sits on the table, while the mid-term corridor eyes $0.30–$0.33. TRX is trading above the 20-day and 200-day SMAs at $0.30, reinforcing a constructive base. On-chain activity remains robust, and Binance spot liquidity sits around a healthy $44.9 million, offering room for a breakout if volume accelerates. With MACD converging and RSI comfortably neutral, upside momentum looks workable as long as price stays above the key $0.32 resistance and doesn’t slip below $0.30. Traders might contemplate conservative entries near $0.305–$0.31 or wait for a clean push beyond $0.32 for a deeper move toward the $0.33–$0.34 zone. Stay mindful of the $0.30 support cluster and the risk of short-term consolidation around overbought short-term Stochastic readings. https://Blockchain.News/news/20260324-price-prediction-trx-tron-targets-033-by-april-2026 #TRX #TRON #CryptoPrediction
item.description: 🔥 TRON keeps a steady pulse at $0.31 with RSI near 67 and price flirting with Bollinger Band resistance. The setup hints at a potential move toward $0.33 by April 2026, anchored by solid support around $0.30. On-chain activity remains robust, and Binance spot liquidity sits around a healthy $44.9 million, offering room for a breakout if volume accelerates. Stay mindful of the $0.30 support cluster and the risk of short-term consolidation around overbought short-term Stochastic readings. https://Blockchain.News/news/20260324-price-prediction-trx-tron-targets-033-by-april-2026 #TRX #TRON #CryptoPrediction

The setup hints at a potential move toward $0.33 by April 2026, anchored by solid support around $0.30. In the short term, a $0.32 target sits on the table, while the mid-term corridor eyes $0.30–$0.33. TRX is trading above the 20-day and 200-day SMAs at $0.30, reinforcing a constructive base. On-chain activity remains robust, and Binance spot liquidity sits around a healthy $44.9 million, offering room for a breakout if volume accelerates. With MACD converging and RSI comfortably neutral, upside momentum looks workable as long as price stays above the key $0.32 resistance and doesn’t slip below $0.30. Traders might contemplate conservative entries near $0.305–$0.31 or wait for a clean push beyond $0.32 for a deeper move toward the $0.33–$0.34 zone. Stay mindful of the $0.30 support cluster and the risk of short-term consolidation around overbought short-term Stochastic readings. https://Blockchain.News/news/20260324-price-prediction-trx-tron-targets-033-by-april-2026 #TRX #TRON #CryptoPrediction

item.title: 🔥 Litecoin sits around $55.66, with a neutral RSI near 50 and a chart that hints at a potential push to the $58–$62 zone in the next 4–6 weeks if buying interest picks up. Short-term targets sit near $56.50–$57.50, with a bullish breakout lined up at the upper Bollinger Band around $58.09 and support solid at $54.13. Price is above the 20- and 50-day SMAs but well below the 200-day average, framing a cautious, mixed setup: a consolidation phase with upside potential if volume supports a move through resistance. Watch for RSI moving above 60, MACD turning positive, and sustained volume to validate a target above $58 and toward $60–$62. A breakdown below $54.13 could open the door to further downside toward $52.23 or worse. More aggressive entries might ride a break above $56.50 with volume confirmation. Source: https://Blockchain.News/news/20260324-price-prediction-ltc-litecoin-targets-58-62-range-by #Litecoin #LTC #CryptoNews

Short-term targets sit near $56.50–$57.50, with a bullish breakout lined up at the upper Bollinger Band around $58.09 and support solid at $54.13. Price is above the 20- and 50-day SMAs but well below the 200-day average, framing a cautious, mixed setup: a consolidation phase with upside potential if volume supports a move through resistance. Watch for RSI moving above 60, MACD turning positive, and sustained volume to validate a target above $58 and toward $60–$62. item.title: 🔥 ATOM is flirting with a $1.84–$1.89 resistance zone as the market cools. At $1.78 with RSI 41.3, the chart shows a neutral, mixed setup: price sits below SMA 7 and SMA 20, with MACD flat and Bollinger bands tightening near support at $1.70. A clean break above $1.84 could spark momentum toward $1.89 and then the upper band around $1.96, opening a path toward the $2.10 range by April 2026 if buying interest returns. But a break below $1.70 would threaten deeper correction toward $1.50–$1.60, about 15–20% lower. Traders may favor a staged entry: small starter near current levels, with a larger add if $1.70–$1.74 holds and the price tests $1.84 with volume. Stay mindful of the 14-day ATR around $0.08 and keep risk in check. https://Blockchain.News/news/20260324-price-prediction-atom-testing-184-resistance-before-potential-210 #ATOM #Cosmos #CryptoForecast
item.description: 🔥 ATOM is flirting with a $1.84–$1.89 resistance zone as the market cools. At $1.78 with RSI 41.3, the chart shows a neutral, mixed setup: price sits below SMA 7 and SMA 20, with MACD flat and Bollinger bands tightening near support at $1.70. A clean break above $1.84 could spark momentum toward $1.89 and then the upper band around $1.96, opening a path toward the $2.10 range by April 2026 if buying interest returns. But a break below $1.70 would threaten deeper correction toward $1.50–$1.60, about 15–20% lower. Traders may favor a staged entry: small starter near current levels, with a larger add if $1.70–$1.74 holds and the price tests $1.84 with volume. Stay mindful of the 14-day ATR around $0.08 and keep risk in check. https://Blockchain.News/news/20260324-price-prediction-atom-testing-184-resistance-before-potential-210 #ATOM #Cosmos #CryptoForecast
